name: Sataki Tiny Home Plan - 16x40 Modern Backyard ADU | DIY Tiny House Plans (640 Sq Ft)
open_features: Modern minimalist architecture designed for backyard ADU use, larger lots, and highly flexible living layouts.
Clean lines, standard framing, and straightforward roof geometry make Sataki approachable for beginners and efficient for experienced builders.
Well-placed doors and balanced window openings maximize natural light, airflow, and functional interior zoning throughout the larger footprint.
Horizontal wood siding, sleek trim accents, and a single-pitch lean-to roof create a modern-rustic aesthetic with timeless curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Sataki Tiny Home - an expansive 16x40 modern living and working space designed for comfort, efficiency, and clean architectural simplicity. With its extended length and generous width, Sataki delivers outstanding interior flexibility while maintaining a sleek, contemporary profile ideal for backyard ADUs, guesthouses, and modern outdoor living environments.
